name: borrower_name_present
expression: borrower_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(borrower_name)) > 0
description: Collateral schedule must identify the borrower or collateral owner.

name: collateral_description_present
expression: collateral_description IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(collateral_description)) > 0
description: Collateral description is required to use the schedule.

name: advance_rate_range
expression: advance_rate_percent IS NULL OR (advance_rate_percent >= 0 AND advance_rate_percent <= 100)
description: Advance rate should be between 0 and 100 percent.

name: collateral_items_array_valid
description: Item-level collateral should be represented as an array.
